title: Fiery Korean Tofu Stir-fry
description: A fresh, aerated solo dinner featuring caramelized jalapeno and macrobiotic-friendly tofu, perfect for a quick yet spicy Jeju-inspired meal.

ingredients.name: jalapeno
ingredients.notes: thinly sliced, seeds removed for less heat

instructions: Press the tofu for 15 minutes to remove excess moisture.
Cut the tofu into 1cm cubes and set aside.
Heat the sesame oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the garlic and stir until fragrant, about 30 seconds.
Add the jalapeno slices and cook, stirring, until they start to caramelize, about 2 minutes.
Add the tofu cubes and gently stir to coat them with the garlic-jalapeno mixture.
Stir in the gochujang and soy sauce, cooking until the sauce thickens slightly, about 1 minute.
Pour in the water, bring to a simmer, then reduce heat to medium-low and cook for 5 minutes until the tofu is tender.
Finish by sprinkling sesame seeds and scallion slices, then serve immediately.
